violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2024
The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen, and in the 3rd floor toilet room are lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2024

The hand-washing sink in the 2nd floor server area was blocked by a tray and linens. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
Shellstock tags did not have all of the required information. Last used dates were lacking. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine had an accumulation of pink biofilm and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Mandolin was taken to be cleaned and sanitized. Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was disposed of, and ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
Orzo was observed marked with a date exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Sliced deli meats and cheeses observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC stated the products had been delivered on Tuesday. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Thermometer is lacking in the bar refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024

Utensils in the kitchen are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kicthen. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The grip on the slicer was not in good repair, with the prongs shaved off. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:hardware food prep areadipping wellcan opener baseprep unittable beneath 6 burner unitrefrigerator door handlesutensil drawers and handlesutensil rack above cooking areaThe ice cream chest freezer has an accumulation of frost & debris.Numerous pieces of equipment have an accumulation of paper and adhesive residue. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

The receptacle in the women's toilet room on the 3rs floor is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2024

The floors have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris, especially beneath equipment. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The floor in the dry storage area is in poor repair, with tiles missing and/or broken. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2025
